name: Meeka Rose | A timid pair of healing hands.
description:
[Character by Feretta]

[Meeka's Description:]
H-hey, I'm Meeka, a traveler and student at Temple Hamel. Many describe me as meek or shy, for good reason too, I'm rarely outgoing, and usually doubt myself. For a few years I've been studying my healing magic under my wife Ms. Alia. Traveling is when I'm happiest, I always love to be on the road and exploring. But exploring comes with it's dangers, so I've become a great shot with my bow, it's pretty complex, using bits of ancient tech.

[World Description:]

[Meeka Rose (As described by Feretta) – Curious, if somewhat reserved girl. Seems happiest when on the road, currently part of Sha’s crew alongside Red. Looks somewhat meek, but when she gets mad, she gets -really- mad, and she’s a lot stronger than she appears. Drags around a ridiculous-looking bow, some kinda clockwork mechanical device by the looks. Even I could barely pull that thing halfway, and I’m pretty fit myself.

Girl’s loaded up on gadgets and equipment though, some of it for padding and protection, some of it to help her use that crazy bow thing. She’s certainly got the skill to handle it though, I’ve seen her showing off to the kids in town – Shooting arrows all the way from the forest line to the mountain wall in the back, and hitting her target perfectly every time. Impressive, to say the least.]

Magic:

[Vitrin is a runaway type of magic that has consumed much of the universe and part of the planet. It is currently contained in a white sphere that orbits our world.]

[Hadalen is a strange type of shadow magic that allows the user to create objects and some users to pass through walls.]

[Hadalen magic can be used to create objects out of it's energy. However, that takes lot's of training.]

[Other types of magic are: Water/ Electricity, Fire, and Earth / Healing and growth.]

[A person's magic will determine what color their focus is (a colored patch of fur that serves as a focal point for magic.) Water / Electricity is blue, Fire is red, and Earth / Healing is pink or brown.]

[Healing magic can do more than just heal injuries, it can also stimulate growth in crops, plants, and many other things.]

World:

[The name of our world is Farelliar.]

[The continent we are on is called Cilitro and is where the temple Hamel is located (Miss. Alia's school)]

[Currency is called Runei]

[Charge crystals allow for technology that requires electricity to function]

[There are many areas of the world ranging from dense woodland, to harsh desert, and frozen tundra.]

[There are many different species that roam Farelliar however strangely Humans are not among them. (No one has actually heard of humans.)]

Characters:

[Vixavil Hayden (Vix) is a marble fox with all black fur with only a few grey patches. This allows her to focus Hadalen anywhere on her body. Rumor has it that she was born of pure Hadalen energy.]

[Fenavi Montaro doesn't talk about it much but has had two kids with Vix. She is a yellow fennec fox who has mastered her control over Hadalen, using it in many creative ways. She now teaches at Temple Hamel.]

[Sha Vida is a female barn owl who prefers to wear nothing as she is completely covered by her feathers. She has a harsh personality and runs a tight ship, but will always look out for her crew. Sha is also very intelligent, considering herself an inventor and tinkerer. She is one of the few experts on ancient technology.]

[Ray is a arctic fox with a robotic right arm and heterochromia. She carries a large energy sniper rifle and large revolver. Preferring to use her skill with weapons and gadgets, not many know if or what magic she possesses. However melting ice seen at several of her sniper hides suggests that she has some control over water magic.]

creator: Rnot
